text: **Anna:** You know I {love|愛する/好きである|/lʌv/|I love my family.} Washington, D.
**Anna:** C.
**Anna:** , but I want to see more of the {United States|アメリカ合衆国|/juˈnaɪtɪd steɪts/|United States is a big country.}
**Anna:** My {roommate|同居人|/ˈruːmmeɪt/|My roommate is friendly.} Marcia and I will be on {vacation|休暇|/vəˈkeɪʃən/|We are on vacation this week.} at the same time.
**Anna:** So we are going on a {road trip|車での旅行|/roʊd trɪp/|We enjoy road trips together.} together.
**Anna:** Hi Marsha.
**Marsha:** Hi!
**Anna:** I {packed|荷造りした|/pækt/|I packed my suitcase.} my bags and I am ready to go.
**Marsha:** Did you make a list of all the places you want to see?
**Anna:** I did
**Anna:** I want to see New York City and the {Statue of Liberty|自由の女神像|/ˈstætʃuː əv ˈlɪbərti/|Statue of Liberty is famous.}
**Marsha:** And I want to see {Mount Rushmore|ラシュモア山|/maʊnt ˈrʌʃmɔːr/|Mount Rushmore has presidents' faces.}
**Marsha:** Mount Rushmore.
**Marsha:** And don't forget
**Anna:** The {Grand Canyon|グランドキャニオン|/grænd ˈkænjən/|Grand Canyon is very deep.}
**Anna:** Let's not forget California's {Redwood|レッドウッド|/ˈredwʊd/|Redwood trees are very tall.} Forest.
**Anna:** There are so many places to see.
**Marsha:** We will be driving for a long time
**Marsha:** So we might get {bored|退屈する|/bɔːrd/|Kids get bored quickly.}
**Marsha:** Bored?
**Anna:** No way!
**Anna:** We can talk or not talk.
**Anna:** We can play word games.
**Anna:** We can sing
**Anna:** You know Marcia, our trip is like that famous American song, This land is your land, this land is my land, from California to New York Allen.
**BOTH:** From the Redwood Forest to the Gulf Stream Waters, this land was made for you and me.
**Anna:** Woo-hoo!
**Marsha:** Will we be {stopping|止まる|/ˈstɒpɪŋ/|We are stopping for lunch.} soon?
**Marsha:** We won't be stopping soon.
**Marsha:** I'm hungry.
**Anna:** {Marsha|マーシャ（人名）}, we just left DC.
**Anna:** We'll be eating {lunch|昼食|/lʌntʃ/|Let's have lunch together.} in about two {hours|時間|/ˈaʊərz/|We waited for two hours.}
**Anna:** Can you wait?
**Marsha:** I guess.
**Anna:** Here, have an {apple|りんご|/ˈæpəl/|I like red apples.}
**Anna:** It's {organic|有機の|/ɔːrˈɡænɪk/|Organic food is healthy.}
**Marsha:** Thanks.
**Marsha:** Okay, we will be {arriving|到着する|/əˈraɪvɪŋ/|We are arriving soon.} in New York City very soon.
**Anna:** I can't wait to see the {big apple|ニューヨーク市|/bɪɡ ˈæpəl/|New York is the big apple.}!
**Anna:** Marcia, look!
**Anna:** There she is!
**Anna:** The Statue of {Liberty|自由の女神|/ˈlɪbərti/|Liberty means freedom.}
**Anna:** She is {awesome|素晴らしい|/ˈɔːsəm/|That concert was awesome.}!
**Anna:** Marsha, in ten minutes, guess what we'll be seeing?
**Anna:** What?
**Anna:** The largest {rocking|揺れる|/ˈrɒkɪŋ/|The chair is rocking.} chair in the world!
**Marsha:** No, we won't be seeing that.
**Anna:** It's on my other {list|リスト/目録|/lɪst/|I made a shopping list.}, Best Roadside Sites.
**Anna:** Oh no, we {littered|ごみを捨てた|/ˈlɪtər/|Don't litter in parks.} and my list is gone.
**Anna:** Don't worry.
**Anna:** I brought the book.
**Anna:** And that is why I am so afraid of {sheep|羊|/ʃiːp/|Sheep are white and fluffy.}
**Anna:** Wow, I feel better.
**Anna:** Marcia, you are a great {listener|聞き手|/ˈlɪsənər/|She is a good listener.}
**Marsha:** Where are we?
**Anna:** We will be {entering|入る|/ˈentərɪŋ/|We are entering the room.} North Dakota any minute now.
**Marsha:** North Dakota, we are going in the wrong {direction|方向|/dəˈrekʃən/|Turn left in this direction.}
**Anna:** We want to go to South Dakota.
**Anna:** No problem.
**Anna:** I will just {exit|出口/出る|/ˈeɡzɪt/|Exit the highway here.} the highway.
**Anna:** We will be {going|行く/進む|/ˈɡoʊɪŋ/|We are going to the park.} south in just a minute.
**Anna:** There.
**Anna:** Done.
**Anna:** We're going south.
**Anna:** Okay, we will be {stopping|止まる/休憩する|/ˈstɑːpɪŋ/|We are stopping for lunch.} for gas and a {bathroom|トイレ/洗面所|/ˈbæθruːm/|The bathroom is clean.} break in about an hour.
**Marsha:** Then we will be
**Marsha:** very near to {Mount|山/山岳|/maʊnt/|Mount Everest is tall.} Rushmore.
**Anna:** Yay!
**Anna:** {Dead|死んだ/亡き|/ded/|The dead leaves fell.} {president's|大統領の|/ˈprezɪdənts/|The president's speech.} heads on the side of a mountain.
**Anna:** Woohoo!
**Anna:** We did it Marcia!
**Anna:** We made it to {California|カリフォルニア州|/ˌkælɪˈfɔːrniə/|California has sunny weather.}!
**Anna:** It's beautiful!
**Marsha:** And we saw everything on the list.
**Anna:** Well, we saw everything on page one of the list.
**Marsha:** What do you mean, page one?
**Anna:** Oh, here are pages two, three, and four.
**Anna:** We'll be very busy {driving|運転する|/ˈdraɪvɪŋ/|I am driving to work.} back to {Washington|ワシントン|/ˈwɑːʃɪŋtən/|Washington is the capital.}, D.
**Anna:** C.
**Anna:** Till next time.
